The '''Cargo Facility 1''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] manufactured by [[VenteX Construction Yards/Legends|VenteX Construction Yards]], a subsidiary of [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. These stations were commonly used to store and distribute cargo, though a few were outfitted for manufacturing duties. Though unarmed, they had relatively strong [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. The C/F1 was superseded by the [[Cargo Facility 2]].
